message:
test(mesh): Update validate_request tests for symbol_size parameter

Update all test calls to validate_request() to include the new
symbol_size parameter (64 bytes as default test value):

- test_validate_authenticated_request
- test_validate_unauthenticated_within_limit
- test_validate_unauthenticated_exceeds_limit
- test_validate_with_missing_hint
- test_validate_hint_too_large

This fixes compilation after the symbol_size parameter was added to
the validate_request() function signature.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
